title: Enable github discussions
body:
Please enable github discussions, at least experimentally to enable us fully evaluate its benefits.

I am quite pleased about my personal experience with it of several projects (2-3k stars)

* helped decluttering the issue tracker
* makes much easier for new users to join the community: both irc and mailing list are old-school mediums which have a considerably higher entry barrier

Note: enabling/disabling the feature is just a checkbox on project settings.

comments.body:
I am supportive of the idea.  It would be great to have community members help us.

@containers/podman-maintainers @fatherlinux PTAL
I'm also in favor of discussions, larger topics can be transferred to the discussion board and we're able to thread into single comments rather than quoting.
Discussions are now live!  Thanks for the request!
